pub fn scan_target(url: &str) -> Result<String, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
    let response = make_request(url)?;
    println!("Scanning {}", url);
    println!("Response length: {}", response.len());
    Ok(response)
}

pub fn process_items(items: &[String]) {
    for item in items {
        println!("Processing: {}", item);
        let result = transform(item);
        println!("Result: {}", result);
    }
}

fn transform(s: &str) -> String { s.to_uppercase() }
fn make_request(_url: &str) -> Result<String, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> { Ok("ok".into()) }

pub struct Scanner;

impl Scanner {
    pub fn run(&self, targets: &[String]) {
        for target in targets {
            eprintln!("[SCAN] {}", target);
            let _ = scan_target(target);
            eprintln!("[DONE] {}", target);
        }
    }
}
